issue_summary: Added thread-safety around use of core's QueryParser. Old XML parser constructors use a mode which will synchronize on use of the user-supplied QueryParser. New constructors offer alternative option of passing "defaultField" String which is used to create a new single-use QueryParser for each parse operation.
javadoc_after:
/**
 * UserInputQueryBuilder uses 1 of 2 strategies for thread-safe parsing:
 * 1) Synchronizing access to "parse" calls on a previously supplied QueryParser
 * or..
 * 2) creating a new QueryParser object for each parse request
 * @author maharwood
 */
